work_history.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
work_history.highlights: Built and maintained a shared design system used by 4 product teams. Introduced Playwright E2E testing, reducing production UI bugs by 30%.

work_history.title: Frontend Developer
work_history.highlights: Migrated Vue 2 storefront to React/Next.js. Owned checkout flow performance, improving conversion by 8%.

resume_text: Senior Frontend Engineer with 6 years of experience across fintech and e-commerce. Deep React/TypeScript/Next.js expertise, strong track record owning design systems and testing infrastructure. Slightly overqualified for a standard Frontend Developer role and expects senior-level compensation.
